variants.description: Drives zero output and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
Subtracts the dctrl7 half-scale residue step instead of adding it.
Uses a half-scale dctrl6 subtraction instead of quarter-scale.
Drives the CDAC residue output at half amplitude.
CDAC Bidirect Residue: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
